name: opencook
description: Codex tools for reading, creating, and editing OpenCook recipes.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Codex to find, add, and revise recipes.
interface.longDescription: OpenCook connects Codex to the local recipe API so it can search your recipes, add recipes extracted from images or text, and safely draft or apply recipe edits.
defaultPrompt: Add this recipe from the image.
Rework this recipe for a weeknight.
